# AI Terms Dictionary

> A comprehensive multilingual AI terminology dictionary covering 200+ AI terms in 6 languages (English, Español, Deutsch, 日本語, Français, 中文).

## About

This site provides clear, accurate definitions of artificial intelligence terminology, including machine learning, deep learning, NLP, and related fields. Each term includes:
- Definition in the user's language
- Key concepts and relationships
- Use cases and applications
- Difficulty level and category
- Cross-language references

## Supported Languages

- English (en): /en/
- Español (es): /es/
- Deutsch (de): /de/
- 日本語 (ja): /ja/
- Français (fr): /fr/
- 中文 (zh): /zh/

## Categories

- basic_concepts: Foundational AI concepts
- training_techniques: Model training methods
- application_paradigms: Application patterns
- engineering_practice: Engineering practices
- ethics_safety: Ethics and safety

## Search

Search is available at /{lang}/search/ (e.g., /en/search/) using Pagefind static search index.

## Sitemap

- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Robots: /robots.txt

## Technical

- Built with Hugo Extended
- Search powered by Pagefind
- Content generated with AGNES_LLM (agnes-2.0-flash)
- Static site, no backend required
